headline: National Council rejects naturalization simplification initiative 130:62.
summary: The "Democracy Initiative" — which would have granted near-automatic citizenship after five years of legal residence, clean criminal record, and basic language competency — was rejected by a clear centre-right majority; Social Democrats and Greens were the sole bloc in favour.

headline: FM Cassis calls Iranian FM Araghchi to discuss regional situation.
summary: The call follows Switzerland's partial reopening of its Tehran embassy earlier this week.

headline: National 142 domestic violence hotline launches May 1.
summary: Callers are routed to cantonal specialists (Mon–Fri 08:00–18:00; inter-cantonal staffing during off-hours).

headline: Vaud: Roger Nordmann (PS) confirmed for DSAS; cantonal portfolios unchanged.
summary: Following his March 29 State Council by-election win, Nordmann takes over the Department of Health and Social Action (13,000 employees, 40% of cantonal budget) — the same portfolio held by his predecessor Rebecca Ruiz.

headline: Pentagon orders 5,000 US troops withdrawn from Germany over the next 6–12 months.
summary: Confirmed by Pentagon spokesman Sean Parnell as a "force posture review"; Trump had publicly clashed with Chancellor Merz after Merz called US Iran war strategy a "humiliation." Trump also threatened comparable pullbacks from Italy and Spain.

headline: UAE exits OPEC effective May 1 — biggest schism in the cartel since its 1960 founding.
summary: The UAE — OPEC's third-largest producer — cited Tehran's missile and drone attacks on UAE territory and Iran's Hormuz disruptions that have throttled UAE oil exports.

headline: Myanmar junta moves Aung San Suu Kyi (80) from prison to house arrest; family still cannot confirm her location.
summary: After 5+ years of imprisonment — with 18 years and 9 months remaining on her sentence — she was transferred to a "designated residence" in Naypyidaw.

headline: EU's Kallas presses ASEAN to wean off Russian oil; US sanctions waiver expires May 16.
summary: Southeast Asian nations hit hardest by Hormuz fuel shortages have turned to discounted Russian crude.

headline: Italy's parliament approves free transfer of aircraft carrier Giuseppe Garibaldi to Indonesia.
summary: The 1985-era vessel (estimated value ~€54M) saves Italy ~€19M in dismantling costs.

headline: Oxford achieves first quadsqueezing: a fourth-order quantum squeezing interaction, 100× faster than predicted.
summary: By combining two non-commuting forces on a single trapped ion, the team generated trisqueezing and quadsqueezing interactions — long theorized but never demonstrated — via the non-commutativity of quantum operations.

headline: TSCM CAR-T trial: 5 of 11 blood cancer patients in complete remission — with no chemotherapy preconditioning.
summary: Stem-cell memory T cells (T_SCM), a rare self-renewing immune subset, achieved complete responses at low doses without lymphodepletion, which normally precedes CAR-T infusions.

headline: LHCb "penguin" B-meson decay anomaly strengthens against Standard Model predictions.
summary: When a B meson decays to a strange kaon and two muons, the angular distributions diverge from SM expectations — and the deviation has grown, not shrunk, with more LHCb data.

headline: "Menstruating" endometrial organoids reveal how uterine lining repairs without scarring.
summary: The 3D mini-tissues shed and regenerate in vitro, implicating luminal epithelial cells — not just glandular cells — in the mystery of monthly scarless repair.

headline: 2604.21751 — Cultural bias in LLMs crystallises at fine-tuning, not pretraining.
summary: "Why are all LLMs Obsessed with Japanese Culture?" introduces the 31,680-question CROQ dataset (24 languages, 66 subtopics) and traces Japanese-culture overrepresentation to SFT rather than pretraining data — directly actionable for post-training alignment audits.

headline: 2604.12634 — RPRA: small models predict LLM-judge scores before responding, routing hard queries to larger models.
summary: Reduces inference cost without sacrificing quality by letting a compact model assess its own response confidence prior to committing — a practical efficiency win for deployed judge-in-the-loop pipelines.

headline: 2604.19775 — Conformal interpretability for LLM agent temporal reasoning.
summary: "From Actions to Understanding" combines step-wise reward modeling with conformal prediction to give statistically valid per-step labels on whether an agent's internal state is on-track — moving interpretability from post-hoc explanation to rigorous uncertainty quantification over agent behaviour.

headline: Asia close (May 1):
summary: Japan open in thin pre–Golden Week trading — Nikkei 225 +0.4% to ~59,500, Topix −0.5% to 3,708.

headline: FX overnight:
summary: USD/CHF ~0.7815, softer dollar reflecting Iran war risk-off bid into CHF.

headline: US futures:
summary: Closed for the weekend (reopen Sunday 18:00 ET).
